creator: de-freebsd@ctseuro.com
text:
Created attachment 225354
owncast-0.0.6 to 0.0.7 patch

I just finished the patch to update www/owncast to version 0.0.7 relesed recently.

The patch changes permissions for most of the files that don't need to be writable for the owncast user. But because of various files that need to be created by the owncast user some subdirectories still are writeable for this user.

I also try to work with the author to get this a bit less cluttered and some of the directories will eventually move to /var/owncast in future versions of this port.

For now i hope this patch is done mostly right.
